subcodes.title: TALO FAKA-PITOA SE LOA
subcodes.first_line:
## TALO FAKA-PITOA SE LOA

KE FAI I ASO KATOA, ITE TAEAO, TUTONU, MOTE AFIAFI

So se tino tela e talo, ke fulu ona lima,
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from BH00987 — Opens 'Strengthen my hands' = Medium Obligatory Prayer, not Long Obligatory. Correct tvl is pm_1103
